payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Partial edge-crop of a light-gray, white and pale-blue horizontally striped pillowcase or soft pillow surface with a subtle woven/cotton texture and shallow, flat profile; appears cropped at the right edge and is close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m away).
